prediction.reasoning: KO (Coca-Cola) is a large-cap dividend aristocrat with low volatility (~15% annualized). For a 6-day forecast, I applied a random walk model with daily volatility of ~0.95%. The point estimate assumes no drift given KO's stable nature. Confidence intervals are based on normal distribution of returns, with 50% CI covering ~1.3 standard deviations, 80% CI covering ~2.6 standard deviations, and 90% CI covering ~3.3 standard deviations of the 6-day price movement.
